hi -> short

code:
import io
import string

fn classify(_ n: Int) -> String
  if n <= 3
    "short"
  else if n <= 7
    "medium"
  else
    "long"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  while true
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let n = string.len(line)
      if n > 0
        let cat = classify(n)
        println("#{line} -> #{cat}")
      end
    when None
      return
    end
  end
end
